# Example Site

> One-line summary of the site for LLMs to understand the rest of the file.

Some plain body context about the project. Any non-heading markdown is allowed here.

## Docs

- [Home](https://example.com/): The landing page.
- [Guide](https://example.com/guide): How to get started.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://example.com/sitemap.xml): Every indexable URL.
